title: Lead SEO Specialist at CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a SEO Specialist in Varanasi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd!
